Match 3 animals. They will be eliminated, and one step less.
Move your finger, and match four. You will get a magic eyepiece.
And it will remove the whole row or column.
The whole row or column is removed.
The animals on the converyer belt will move after one elimination.
When the match is a L or T shape, a Sunglass Bomb is generated.
The bomb can remove the animals on a large scale. Wait and see!
The more booms, The easier to finish the task.
Task: Grow the lawn. Move the animals and eliminate them. The blank area will turn to lawn.
Remove the animals and the lawn will grow. The task of this levle is to grow 30 squares of lawn.
Match 5 animals, a powerful sprite will appear.
Exchange its position with any animal. All the same animals on the board will disappear.
There will be some special squares, like the ice cubes under the animals.
Remove the animals on the ice cubes, they will break.
Break all the ice cubes to finish the task.
Task: Collect Gems. Collecting enough gems to finish the task.
Remove the animals with gem, you can get the gems.
See, different special animals can take mix effects
Exchange the position of the two eyepiecees can make a cross explosion.
Exchange with different special animals, get different special effects.
Find hard to match 4? Use the magic eyepiece.
Magic eyepiece changes the normal animals into horizontal or vertical eyepieces
Tap the two animals, then their positions will exchange.
Let's meet the bubbles. Pierce them, the water surface will rise up.
The animals in the water will float up.
We need to deliver the bone cookies to the bottom to collect them.
These cakes appear randomly at the top. Move them to the bottom to collect them.
Collect all the cookies in the given steps.
Hatch powerful pets to get more power.
Your pets are waiting for you here.
Tap the "Hatch" to get the pets.
Let's learn how to strengthen the pet, click here.
Choose a low-level pet as the upgrading material
